description: Scales selected text up by a factor, holds at the larger size, then scales back to original size. Accepts any number of select variables, even across different write components. Default scale factor is 2x. Supports animation duration and color customization during scaling.
utility: Animate text scaling — grow and shrink text elements with optional timing and color

arguments.name: select
arguments.description: Select variable(s) to scale — one or more selections from select() or selectexcept()

arguments.name: size
arguments.description: Scale factor (default 2). Example: size(1.5) scales to 1.5x original size

alternates.description: Scale by custom factor (1.5x in this example)
Scale with specified duration and stroke color

examples.scenario: Scale area strip expression to emphasize
Scale x^2 and x terms in quadratic equation with deferred playback
examples.expression:
write_1=write(at(8,4),"ax^2 + bx + c = 0",t(5))
select_4 = select(write_1, "x^2", 1)
select_5 = select(write_1, "x", 2)
text_scale_1=textscale(select_4,size(1.2),defer())
text_scale_2=textscale(select_5,size(1.2),defer())
